name: agent-team-orchestration
tagline: ClawHub (81★): Orchestrate multi-agent teams with defined roles, task lifecycles, handoff protocols, and review workflows. Use when: (1) Se
verdict: Strong marks across security and quality (both A) - this one is well-built. The only gap is hygiene: no version field, changelog, or dated revision notes, so there's no way to tell if the skill has changed since a consumer last trusted it.

highlights.summary: No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, no dated revision notes anywhere in the document.
